description: Deterministic rules that compute per-hazard risk, aggregate Residual Risk Index, apply policy escalations, and map hazards and qualification band to IQ/OQ/PQ templates. Rules reference equipmentType-specific ruleIds.

rules.name: Compute per-hazard risk and Residual Risk Index

logic.details: Map Severity/Probability/Exposure/Detectability/ControlEffectiveness option labels to numeric values using canonical mapping table.

rules.if: exists hazard where hazard.ruleId startsWith 'R_STER' and Severity == 1.0 and equipment.siteContext.productContact == true
rules.rationale: Conservative escalation for catastrophic sterilization hazards affecting product contact

rules.if: exists hazard where hazard.ruleId == 'R_ANA_HPLC_002' and controlArchitecture == 'Computerized Data System with electronic records'
rules.then: ensure CSV tests included in OQ and PQ
rules.rationale: Data integrity hazards with electronic records require CSV guidance

rules.if: equipmentType == 'HVAC Air Handling Unit serving cleanrooms' and siteContext.cleanroomClass in ['ISO 5','ISO 6','ISO 7']
rules.then: increase Exposure by 0.2 for hazards affecting cleanroom performance
rules.rationale: Multiple-zone effect increases exposure for HVAC hazards

logic.expression: ResidualRiskIndex = max(hazard.EscalatedResidualRiskForMapping if present else hazard.ResidualRisk) + 0.1 * sum(hazard.EscalatedResidualRiskForMapping if present else hazard.ResidualRisk)

then.qualificationDepth: Installation Qualification + Operational Qualification + targeted Performance Qualification
Full Installation Qualification + Operational Qualification + Performance Qualification with microbiological verification where applicable

rules.name: Map equipment-type hazards and qualification band to IQ/OQ/PQ templates

IQ: verify steam supply and condensate traps
PQ: 3 consecutive worst-case cycles with biological indicators

IQ: verify EtO gas monitoring and aeration equipment
collect EtO process validation and FAT reports
PQ: biological indicator runs appropriate for EtO
residual EtO testing per product type

IQ: installation verification and instrument calibration certificates
verify detector lamp and flow path integrity

logic.if: hazard.ruleId == 'R_ANA_HPLC_002' and controlArchitecture == 'Computerized Data System with electronic records'

IQ: record CDS software version and configuration baseline
PQ: longitudinal audit trail review during PQ runs

OQ: basic functional tests per supplier specification
comprehensive functional tests across operational envelope
PQ: targeted PQ runs focusing on worst-case scenarios

IQ: software baseline and CSV checklist if electronic records present
OQ: CSV tests if electronic records present
PQ: full PQ with microbiological verification where applicable
